title: Provider and Tool Errors, Retry Eligibility, Idempotency, Compensation, and Stop · Program Brief: Compensation Stop
summary: Every exception receives exponential retry, rate-limit guidance is ignored, write tools repeat after timeouts, compensation is untested, and terminal failures become generic apologies. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the compensation stop increment in typed idempotent agent recovery policy. Learners progress through prediction, expl…
objectives: Design and test compensation where possible, preserve partial evidence, stop visibly when safety is uncertain, and escalate irreversible outcomes.
Use operation keys, effect receipts, status reconciliation, deduplication windows, and atomic state to prevent duplicate writes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

Build deterministic Python evidence to classify provider and tool failures, retry only safe cases with bounded backoff, preserve idempotency, compensate, and stop visibly; model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. A defensible solution applies Compensation Stop, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to typed idempotent agent recovery policy.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-errors-retries-idempotency-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-errors-retries-idempotency-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_errors_retries_idempotency_4(failures: int = 18, retryable_failures: int = 8, terminal_failures: int = 10, successful_retries: int = 7, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if failures < 1 or retryable_failures < 0 or terminal_failures < 0:
        return False, failures, "failure-count"
    if retryable_failures + terminal_failures != failures:
        return False, retryable_failures, "failure-classification"
    if successful_retries < 0 or successful_retries > retryable_failures:
        return False, successful_retries, "retry-evidence"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "retry-duplicate-effect"
    assert retryable_failures + terminal_failures == failures and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, successful_retries, "idempotent-agent-recovery"
